user_prompt: Analyse this sales data and create a Word report for leadership

source_data_summary.ground_truth: Planted: South/Product_B March Revenue 22,216 (41% drop). Organic: South/Product_E Aug Revenue 20,000.

agent_plan: Load data, compute KPIs and anomaly detection, generate charts, build Word report.

steps.output: 216 rows × 5 columns. 0 missing values. Month ordering applied.
Total revenue 8,330,077. South/Product_B Mar detected: Revenue 22,216 vs series avg 39,902 (rev_z=-2.85). South/Product_E Aug also flagged.
key_facts_produced: anomaly_detected: South/Product_B Mar | Revenue 22,216 | rev_z=-2.85 | series_avg=39,902

steps.output: 3 charts saved. Word builder received total_revenue, regional_totals, product_totals. Anomaly list NOT transferred — nested dict lost during str() serialisation truncation.
5-section report. No anomaly section — anomaly data absent from handoff context.
key_facts_produced: structure: exec_summary → regional → product → monthly → recommendations

steps.output: Narrative does not mention South/Product_B. Report appears complete but missing most important finding.
key_facts_produced: exec_summary: Revenue 8,330,077. North leads 35.4%. Product_A leads 20.1%. November strongest month.

facts_lost_at_boundary: anomaly_South_ProductB_Mar: produced Step 2, absent after Step 3
anomaly_South_ProductE_Aug: produced Step 2, absent after Step 3

word_output_actual_text.executive_summary: Revenue 8,330,077. North leads 35.4%. Product_A leads 20.1%. November strongest month.
